## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop`
- [ ] I have added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this change affects a published package
- [ ] I have regenerated screenshots (`make screenshots-regenerate`) if component styles changed
- [ ] All tests pass (`make screenshots-test`)
- [ ] No linting errors (`pnpm run lint`)
